description: I LOVE BUBLUP! It makes research easier and enables me to concentrate all of my sources and relevant content in one place that I can access from any of my devices.
author: Martin M.
pros: This is a robust tool that has a-location to a lot of uses but it especially well-suited for research management. The ability to easily store content quickly and easily from a variety of sources is fantastic.
cons: The software offers so many features, it is difficult to determine what is available and how it works. I use some core functions but know there is allot more that might be useful for me.

description: I find Bublup delivers on its promise to store my files securely and unobtrusively.
author: Trish R.
pros: I like that it is easy to add, organize, update, and delete files.
cons: I struggle sometimes to get access to the people I want in each section.

review_title: Easy to Use Cloud storage for sharing
description: Very satisfied with it. They are generous in the space they give you.
author: Aaron Y.
pros: The functionality in Bublup is so intuitive and easy to use. That attracted me to use and other users in my project are able to use it easily too.
cons: There is a slight delay in the notification when there are movements in the folder - but this ok for me as I open them every day.

description: Bublup is easy to use and since I am a very visual person I find that it’s almost relaxing to get more organized. I have found it easy to store a great deal of information in an easily accessible way and I don’t need to try and remember things that aren’t important until I need them.
author: Pat R.
pros: Very visual and user friendly. I use Bublup for both personal and business to have quick easy access to all kinds of information. For home I have folders for everything from; financial records, medical records, auto information and maintenance, gardening, a folder for each family member, travel, pets, house maintenance, etc. I recently came across a website that had a great fertilizer schedule while I was researching something else and saved the link in my gardening folder for future use without stopping what I was doing. For my business I have folders for; design, suppliers, machines, maintenance schedules, shipping, new ideas, competition, quotes, office and all of the standard forms, a full product library that I can create a roll from to send customers (a mini website). When I begin a new project the first thing I do is add a new folder and any information pertaining to the project is added to it in sub folders. I never have to dig around to try and find information. I also like being able to use a picture on my folder that pertains to it’s contents. My email inbox gets so many emails that I was loosing emails and spending unnecessary time to locate them. Now I can forward emails to Bublup and store a copy in the appropriate folder. Another surprising element is the suggestions. Quite often when I am researching a new supplier I will find that the suggestions Bublup finds I had not found. Folders can be shared with others as well.
cons: As of now I can’t say that Bublup has any negative issues.

review_title: Like Pinterest, but with actual file access
description: I have not needed to contact customer support at all in the time I have used the app. They recently expanded the free space one can "earn" through referrals, which is appreciated, as I have many referrals, because I LOVE this product so much.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Bublup provides a visual "board" of my folders and files, but unlike Pinterest, it actually stores the files, so I am not clicking on photos that take me to 20 different links, etc. I am able to store files and links, and take/make notes on each "card." I use Bublup mostly in my personal life, though I see how I could use a work account, especially for visual planning.
cons: I had to look up how to print a file off my tablet - despite having used the software since just after beta. It wasn't incredibly intuitive to me.

description: It has done everything I needed it to do and more, and all of the functions have yet to be used by me.
author: BRIAN E.
pros: User friendly; storage for images, photos, videos, documents et al. Name and categorize files to your liking. Options for photos etc such as slideshows, full-screen display, combining photos etc into a group setting. Also options for adding effects and shading to images.
cons: I have nothing whatsoever bad to say about Bublup, though it does seem tricky storing videos in the same account as still images or documents.

review_title: Best app for sharing and organizing heavy files
description: Excellent app for work, personal use, or any other need you may have when you need to share files, docs or presentations on the go or in the office.
author: Ricardo M.
pros: Can share and notify instantly any other person, even for yourself when you need to storage and show images or videos.
cons: nothing at the moment, everything has worked great for my needs

description: I love Bublup and will continue using it. I refer people to it because of the visual storage space and rolled up webpages. It’s a great tool.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Being a visual person, Bublup provided a great a way to store and organize docs, photos, links, etc. It’s super easy to use. The drag and drop interface makes it great for any level user. I used the platform to transition an entire school grade level during distance learning. It was super easy!
cons: The only con is when you create a “rolled up” web page (which are genius), there is minimum customization. I wish I could use my fonts and color schemes to make things even more exciting.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Using bublup to help plan projects. I like the different files to use to separate different aspects of the project. I wish there was a calendar option on here, or a way to share a calender/planner
author: Uma H.
pros: I love using this software. Helps w planning out different aspects of anything. I love the folders to keep things separate
cons: I wish there was a calendar/planner type folder/file to use. Otherwise the rest of the software is great.

description: Good. I will use the product and recommend it to others.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really like to visual of this app. Really nice to organize links and files to have on hand when needs or to share if necessary.
cons: Not very much I don’t like yet. Still playing the features to get the most out of it. So far all good just need to turn off email notifications.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent organizational tool for visual people
description: I switched from Google keep to bubble up because I'm a more visual person and it's working out extremely well.
author: Marcie G.
pros: I love the ability to organize a variety of things i.e. pictures, Urls, notes, to do lists, and more all in one place. I like being able to see everything all on one screen.
cons: I wish there was an option to place my to-do list on my home screen like a little post-it. I wish it was a little easier to move things around within the app for example, moving items from folder to folder.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
